touches.ai_summary: Cold email sent to Amelia Rao introducing our revenue intelligence platform and highlighting forecasting accuracy improvements. No response received.
Cold call attempt to Amelia Rao. No answer, left voicemail referencing email and forecasting challenges in scaling revenue teams.
Second cold call attempt. No answer, no voicemail left this time.
Brief connection call with Amelia. She mentioned current forecasting accuracy issues and expressed interest in learning more. Scheduled discovery call for next week.

questions_asked.question: What's your biggest challenge with revenue forecasting right now?
questions_asked.answer: Our forecast accuracy is around 65% and leadership is pushing for better visibility into pipeline health.

next_steps: Schedule discovery call for next Tuesday

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email confirming discovery call scheduled for Tuesday at 2pm. Included agenda focusing on current forecasting process and pain points.

questions_asked.question: Will this cover integration with our existing CRM setup?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, we'll walk through our Salesforce integration capabilities during the call.

next_steps: Prepare discovery call agenda
Review Salesforce integration docs

touches.ai_summary: Email from Amelia asking to reschedule discovery to Thursday same time due to conflict. Confirmed new time and shared pre-call questionnaire.
next_steps: Discovery call rescheduled to Thursday 2pm

touches.ai_summary: Discovery call with Amelia covering current RevOps stack, forecasting methodology, and pain points. Team of 46, currently using basic Salesforce reports. Major issue is lack of deal-level intelligence and poor visibility into rep activity. Interested in AI-powered insights for pipeline review. Mentioned they've been looking at Gong as well.

questions_asked.question: How are you currently tracking conversation intelligence and deal velocity?
questions_asked.answer: We're mostly manual right now. Reps log notes in Salesforce but there's no structured analysis or pattern recognition.

questions_asked.question: What's driving the evaluation timeline?
questions_asked.answer: We need something in place before Q3 planning starts in about 8 weeks. Our forecast miss last quarter cost us credibility with the board.

questions_asked.question: How does your AI scoring compare to Gong's deal health features?
questions_asked.answer: Our XGBoost model focuses specifically on close probability with 30+ signals, while Gong emphasizes conversation analytics. We can show you a side-by-side comparison.

objections: We're also evaluating Gong and they seem to have more market presence
next_steps: Schedule product demo for next week
Send competitive comparison with Gong
Include use case on forecast accuracy

touches.ai_summary: Product demo focused on forecast accuracy dashboard, AI deal scoring, and pipeline health insights. Amelia engaged positively with the forecast rollup features and automation capabilities. Asked detailed questions about data requirements and ramp time. Expressed concern about implementation timeline given Q3 deadline.

questions_asked.question: How long does it typically take to get accurate AI predictions after implementation?
questions_asked.answer: Most customers see meaningful predictions within 3-4 weeks once we have 60 days of historical data ingested.

questions_asked.question: Can we customize the forecast categories beyond your standard model?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, the platform supports custom stage definitions and probability curves tailored to your sales cycle.

questions_asked.question: What's your current sales cycle length for deals in this size range?
questions_asked.answer: Usually 45-60 days from opportunity creation to close for our core product.

next_steps: Set up technical evaluation with sandbox environment
Provide implementation timeline estimate
Schedule follow-up to review questions

touches.ai_summary: Technical evaluation session where Amelia and a sales ops analyst tested the platform with their data. Focused on Salesforce integration, custom field mapping, and automation setup. Team impressed with ease of setup but raised questions about ongoing data governance. Discussed 7-seat configuration for RevOps team plus leadership.

questions_asked.question: How do you handle data quality issues in the source CRM?
questions_asked.answer: The platform includes data health monitoring and flags incomplete records that could impact prediction accuracy. We also provide cleanup recommendations.

questions_asked.question: What level of admin access is needed for the Salesforce integration?
questions_asked.answer: We need API access and read permissions on standard objects. Installation takes about 30 minutes with your Salesforce admin.

questions_asked.question: Do you have any concerns about moving forward to the proposal stage?
questions_asked.answer: I need to loop in our VP of Sales before committing. He'll want to see the business case and understand the ROI.

objections: We need executive buy-in before moving forward with pricing discussions
next_steps: Prepare proposal for 7 seats with unlimited automation tier
Create ROI analysis for VP of Sales review
Schedule proposal review call

touches.ai_summary: Proposal review call with Amelia. Walked through 7-seat package at $6,400 ACV with unlimited automation tier. Amelia positive on value but mentioned VP of Sales (not on call) will need to approve budget. Discussed implementation timeline to meet Q3 planning deadline.

questions_asked.question: Is there flexibility on the per-seat pricing if we commit to annual?
questions_asked.answer: The $6,400 annual rate already reflects a discount from monthly billing. We have some flexibility at higher seat counts.

questions_asked.question: When can we get time with your VP of Sales to review the proposal?
questions_asked.answer: I'll work on getting him scheduled. He's been pretty heads-down on the quarter-end push.

next_steps: Amelia to schedule VP of Sales review meeting
Send formal proposal document
Provide customer references in similar company size

touches.ai_summary: Pricing discussion call with Amelia. She requested a discount, mentioning Gong's competitive pricing and budget constraints. Discussed potential 10% reduction if they commit by month-end. Amelia still hasn't confirmed VP of Sales meeting. Concern about single-threading through RevOps without sales leadership engaged.

questions_asked.question: Gong came in lower on their quote - can you match or get closer to their pricing?
questions_asked.answer: Our pricing reflects the specialized forecasting capabilities and unlimited automation. I can explore a 10% discount for a multi-year commitment.

questions_asked.question: What's the status on getting your VP involved in the evaluation?
questions_asked.answer: Still working on his calendar. I have budget authority for tools under $10K so we should be able to move forward.

questions_asked.question: How is the decision process typically structured at MapleTech for software purchases?
questions_asked.answer: For our team tools, I usually drive the decision with VP sign-off as a formality. Finance approval is needed over $15K.

objections: The pricing is higher than Gong's quote and I need to justify the premium
next_steps: Send revised proposal with 10% discount for annual commit
Request introduction to VP of Sales
Provide differentiation summary vs Gong

touches.ai_summary: Meeting with Amelia and VP of Sales (Marcus Chen) to review business case. Marcus engaged but asked pointed questions about ROI timeline and whether the forecast improvement claims are realistic. Amelia advocated strongly for the platform. Marcus wants to see a pilot approach rather than full 7-seat rollout. Discussed starting with 3 seats and expanding if successful.

questions_asked.question: What's the typical improvement in forecast accuracy your customers see in the first quarter?
questions_asked.answer: Most customers improve accuracy by 10-15 percentage points within 90 days, though results vary by data quality and adoption.

questions_asked.question: Can we structure this as a pilot with fewer seats and expand if it works?
questions_asked.answer: We can start with a minimum 5-seat deployment. Going below that impacts the AI model effectiveness across your team.

questions_asked.question: What happens if we don't see the forecast improvement we need?
questions_asked.answer: We include quarterly business reviews and optimization support. Most accuracy issues stem from adoption rather than platform capability.

objections: The full 7-seat commitment feels risky without proven results in our environment
We're still evaluating Gong and haven't ruled them out
next_steps: Explore 5-seat minimum pricing option
Provide customer case study with similar accuracy improvement goals
Follow up on final decision timeline
